name: Eve Holding, Inc.
description: Eve Holding, Inc. is dedicated to accelerating the Urban Air Mobility (UAM) ecosystem. Backed by Embraer S.A., the company is developing an advanced electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft, a comprehensive global services and support network, and a unique urban air traffic management software solution. Eve is committed to delivering safe, affordable, and sustainable urban air transportation, fostering collaborative partnerships to shape the future of global flight.
